steps.t: Bingo is unsure how best to describe Tom Bombadil for his written account of the journey, and has asked you to go directly to the subject for answers.
Tom Bombadil asked you to stand in the foam of the waterfall south of his house, if you want to learn about him.
You stood in the waterfall that Tom suggested, and should now see what you were supposed to have learned from the experience.
Old Man Willow is further west along the Withywindle, west of Tom Bombadil's house. Tom Bombadil has asked you to go dance with Old Man Willow if you …
Tom Bombadil is at his house to the east of Old Man Willow. You have danced with Old Man Willow, as Tom requested.
Bingo is outside Tom Bombadil's house, in the Old Forest. You tried to learn more about Tom Bombadil, but the mysterious fellow does not seem given to…
Bingo has asked you to show his manuscript to Tom Bombadil in an effort to get the mysterious fellow to open up about his history and origin.
Goldberry has returned from her spring. During the day she can be found inside the house of Tom Bombadil, and at night she likes to walk around outsid…
Goldberry may have given you the answer Bingo was seeking, and you should now return to the hobbit to see if he agrees.
